headlines.title: Seattle Mariners Opening Day 2026 Approaching
headlines.summary: The Seattle Mariners' 2026 season Opening Day is scheduled for March 26 against the Cleveland Guardians at T-Mobile Park. This marks the 50th season in franchise history.

headlines.title: Sound Transit 2 Line Crosslake Connection Opening March 28
headlines.summary: The Crosslake Connection for the Sound Transit 2 Line is scheduled to open on March 28, 2026, completing the connection across Lake Washington and linking Seattle to the Eastside. New stations at Mercer Island and Judkins Park will provide connections between Seattle and Bellevue/Redmond.

headlines.title: Seattle Kraken Lose 5-2 to Columbus Blue Jackets
headlines.summary: The Seattle Kraken fell to the Columbus Blue Jackets 5-2 on Saturday, March 21. Columbus scored three times in the first period and extended their point streak to 12 games. The Kraken have now lost 4 straight games and tumbled out of a playoff spot.

headlines.title: Skagit Valley Tulip Festival May Begin Early Due to Warm Weather
headlines.summary: The 2026 Skagit Valley Tulip Festival may begin earlier than usual this year due to warmer weather patterns. The festival is a major spring attraction for Seattle-area residents.

headlines.title: Seattle Kraken Extend Broadcast Deal with KING 5 Owner Tegna
headlines.summary: The Seattle Kraken have extended their broadcast partnership with Tegna through multiple seasons, continuing games on KONG and KING 5.

headlines.title: Link Light Rail 2 Line Simulated Service Update
headlines.summary: 2 Line simulated service did not operate from March 18-22 as trains ran pre-simulated service between South Bellevue and Downtown Redmond. This planned closure does not impact the opening date.

events_this_weekend.name: Seattle's South Park 'Best Day Ever' Series
events_this_weekend.description: South Park neighborhood kicked off the city's new 'Best Day Ever' series on Saturday.
